title: Kenyan Sweetcorn and Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish originating from Kenya, combining the natural sweetness of sweetcorn with the comforting taste of pilaf.
instructions: Thaw the buttery flaky pastry according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the Kenyan pilaf mix, sweetcorn, water, and salt. Mix well.
Roll out the thawed pastry to fit a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Spoon the pilaf mixture into the pastry-lined baking dish.
Dot the top with melted butter.
Fold the pastry edges over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
